description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern, minimalist design, upholstered in a dark gray fabric. The sofa features a low-profile backrest and wide, flat armrests at both ends, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. It is equipped with multiple loose back cushions and seat cushions, all of which are uniform in size and shape, contributing to a cohesive look. The base of the sofa is solid and boxy, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and substantial presence. The upholstery appears to be a tightly woven fabric with a matte finish, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden or metal frame beneath the cushioning. This type of sofa is well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern living rooms, or communal lounge areas.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa in dark gray fabric with a low backrest, wide armrests, and multiple uniform cushions. Its modern, boxy design and matte upholstery make it ideal for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: The L-shaped sectional sofa is seen from above and the front, showing its full length, corner configuration, and all cushions clearly.
description_view_1: The sofa is viewed from the side, highlighting the depth of the seat and the thickness of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the continuous, straight backrest and the solid, uninterrupted base of the sofa.
description_view_3: The opposite side view emphasizes the extended chaise section and the arrangement of cushions along the backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six loose, uniform rectangular back cushions and three seat cushions arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout; all cushions appear unattached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, flat, rectangular armrests present at both ends, matching the sofa's height and featuring a straight, boxy profile with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the sofa base appears as a solid, continuous plinth, suggesting a hidden or recessed support structure.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest running along both sections of the L-shape, with no segmentation or tufting, supporting loose back cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle, fine woven texture and no visible decorative stitching or patterning.
